channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [LOKESHMACH] Lokesh Machines clarifies preferential issue details
item.description:
Lokesh Machines Ltd has issued clarifications regarding its proposed preferential issue of equity shares and warrants. The company amended its explanatory statement, specifying that promoters, promoter group members, directors, and KMPs do not intend to participate in the equity share issue but will subscribe to warrants. However, specific individuals including Mr. Bollineni Kishore Babu, Mr. Mullapudi Srikrisha, Mr. Srinivas Mullapudi, Mr. Mullapudi Ajay Kumar, and Mrs. Naga Satya Swaroopa Rani Mullapudi intend to subscribe to equity shares. The Ultimate Beneficial Owners of Zandra Herbs & Plantations LLP were identified as Mr. Sharvil Ramanbhai Patel and Mr. Pankaj Ramanbhai Patel. The company also confirmed that the valuation report complies with SEBI ICDR Regulations, 2018.

  • Promoters and KMPs will subscribe to warrants, not equity shares, in the preferential issue.
  • Specific promoters, including Mr. Bollineni Kishore Babu, intend to subscribe to equity shares.
  • Ultimate Beneficial Owners of Zandra Herbs & Plantations LLP identified as Sharvil and Pankaj Patel.
  • Valuation report for the preferential issue complies with SEBI ICDR Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LOKESH MACHINES LTD. | Category: Clarification

item.title: [JINDALSTEL] Jindal Steel Board to Meet May 1 for FY26 Results & Final Dividend
item.description:
Jindal Steel Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on May 1, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for the Financial Year 2025-26. Additionally, the Board will also consider recommending the payment of a final dividend on equity shares for FY2025-26, if any. In compliance with SEBI regulations, the trading window for designated persons remains closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the results are publicly disclosed.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 1, 2026.
  • To consider and approve Audited Financial Results for FY2025-26.
  • Board will also consider recommending a final dividend for FY2025-26.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until results are public.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JINDAL STEEL & POWER LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BTML] Bodhi Tree Board to meet May 4 for fund-raising proposal
item.description:
Bodhi Tree Multimedia Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on May 4, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve a proposal for fund-raising. This could involve a preferential issue, private placement, and/or a rights issue of securities, for cash or other considerations, including the determination of the issue price. Any such fund-raising would be subject to necessary regulatory and shareholder approvals. Additionally, the trading window for dealing in the company's securities has been closed since April 1, 2026, in anticipation of the declaration of audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. This closure applies to all connected persons and insiders.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 4, 2026, to consider fund-raising.
  • Proposal includes preferential issue, private placement, and/or rights issue.
  • Fund-raising will require regulatory and shareholder approvals.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, for FY26 results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bodhi Tree Multimedia Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [KABRAEXTRU] Kabra Extrusiontechnik CFO Daulat Jain Resigns
item.description:
Kabra Extrusiontechnik Ltd. announced the resignation of Mr. Daulat Jain, its Chief Financial Officer (CFO) and Key Managerial Personnel (KMP). His resignation is effective from the close of business hours on April 27, 2026. The company stated that Mr. Jain is resigning to pursue another career opportunity, and there are no other material reasons for his departure. Mr. Jain has committed to supporting a smooth handover process during his transition.

  • Kabra Extrusiontechnik's CFO, Mr. Daulat Jain, has resigned.
  • His resignation is effective from April 27, 2026.
  • The reason cited is to pursue another career opportunity.
  • No other material reasons for the CFO's departure were disclosed.
  • Mr. Jain will assist in the handover process for a smooth transition.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KABRA EXTRUSIONTECHNIK LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [OLPCL] Olympic Cards requests BSE to rectify corporate information
item.description:
Olympic Cards Ltd has formally requested the BSE to update and rectify several details under its "Corporate Information" section. The company seeks to include the last book-closure period (August 14, 2025, to September 20, 2025) under security details. It also requests the deletion of "MRC & Associates" as statutory auditors and the replacement of "K. Elangovan & M. Keerthana" with "Deenadayalu.R." as secretarial auditor. Additionally, the company highlighted that its "Corporate Actions" filings on BSE are only available up to January 11, 2024, and has requested an update for all subsequent filings.

  • BSE requested to update book-closure dates.
  • Statutory auditor "MRC & Associates" to be removed.
  • Secretarial auditor changed to Deenadayalu.R.
  • Company seeks update on "Corporate Actions" filings post Jan 2024.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OLYMPIC CARDS LTD. | Category: Clarification

item.title: [SHOPERSTOP] Shoppers Stop Board to meet on May 5 for FY26 results
item.description:
Shoppers Stop Ltd. has announced that its Board of Directors will convene a meeting on Tuesday, May 05, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results (Consolidated and Standalone) for both the quarter and the full financial year ended March 31, 2026. In compliance with SEBI regulations, the trading window for dealing in the company's equity shares by designated persons and their immediate relatives has been closed since March 25, 2026. This closure will continue until 48 hours after the declaration of the said financial results, ensuring fair disclosure and preventing insider trading.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 5, 2026.
  • To approve Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • Trading window closed from March 25, 2026.
  • Closure to last 48 hours post results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHOPPERS STOP LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [FABTECH] Fabtech Technologies: No IPO Fund Deviation for Q4 FY26
item.description:
Fabtech Technologies confirmed no deviation in the utilization of funds raised through its Initial Public Offering (IPO) for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The company raised ₹2,30,29,65,305/- via IPO on October 7, 2025. This statement, mandated by SEBI Regulation 32, was reviewed and noted by the Audit Committee on April 27, 2026, affirming full compliance.

  • No deviation in IPO fund utilization for Q4 FY26.
  • IPO raised ₹230.30 crore on October 7, 2025.
  • Statement reviewed by Audit Committee on April 27, 2026.
  • Confirms compliance with SEBI Regulation 32.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fabtech Technologies Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [ARUNIS] Kalind Ltd Board Approves FY26 Audited Results, Reappoints Auditor
item.description:
Kalind Ltd's Board of Directors met on April 27, 2026, approving the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board also re-appointed M/s PSSJ & CO. LLP as the Internal Auditor for three financial years (FY2026-27 to FY2028-29). Mr. Ayush Dharmendrabhai Jasani, Vice Chairman & Managing Director, was appointed as the Nodal Officer and authorized to determine materiality of events under SEBI regulations. Additionally, several company policies, including Archival, Dividend Distribution, and Related Party Transactions policies, were reviewed and updated. The independent auditor's report on standalone financial results included a qualified opinion.

  • Board approved audited Q4 and FY26 standalone & consolidated financial results.
  • M/s PSSJ & CO. LLP re-appointed as Internal Auditor for FY27-FY29.
  • Mr. Ayush D. Jasani appointed Nodal Officer and KMP for materiality determination.
  • Key company policies, including Dividend Distribution and RPT, were updated.
  • Auditor's report on standalone results included a qualified opinion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Arunis Abode Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SHREYAS] Transworld Shipping Lines sells vessel 'SSL Gujarat' for US$ 3.5 Mn
item.description:
Transworld Shipping Lines Ltd (formerly known as Shreyas Shipping and Logistics Limited) announced the signing of a Memorandum of Agreement (MOA) on April 27, 2026, for the sale of its vessel, M.V. SSL Gujarat. The vessel is being sold to Avana Logistek Limited for a consideration of US$ 3,500,000. The company clarified that the parties involved are not related to the promoter/promoter group/group companies, and the transaction does not fall under related party transactions.

  • Transworld Shipping Lines to sell vessel M.V. SSL Gujarat.
  • Sale consideration for the vessel is US$ 3.5 million.
  • Agreement signed with Avana Logistek Limited on April 27, 2026.
  • The transaction is not considered a related party transaction.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHREYAS SHIPPING & LOGISTICS LTD. | Category: Divestment

item.title: [AUBANK] AU SFB Updates KMP Contact Details for Disclosures
item.description:
AU Small Finance Bank Ltd has provided the updated contact details of its Key Managerial Personnel (KMPs) authorized for determining the materiality of events and making disclosures to the Stock Exchange(s). This disclosure is in compliance with Regulation 30(5) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The authorized personnel include Mr. Sanjay Agarwal (Managing Director & CEO), Mr. Vivek Tripathi (Executive Director), Mr. Gaurav Jain (Chief Financial Officer), and Mr. Manmohan Parnami (Company Secretary & Compliance Officer). The filing includes email and phone contact details for the MD & CEO.

  • AU SFB updated KMP contact details for disclosures.
  • KMPs authorized for materiality determination and stock exchange filings.
  • Includes MD & CEO, Executive Director, CFO, and Company Secretary.
  • Filing complies with SEBI Regulation 30(5).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AU Small Finance Bank Ltd | Category: Corporate Governance
